name: Kuuvahki Experimental Design Bureau
title: Kuuvahki Experimental Design Bureau
desc: This leviathan forged of white iron and black steel hungrily devours all in its sight – energy, blood, and tears alike. Yet what it seeks is not plunder, but power enough to withstand the looming calamity.

skills.desc:
End Phase: Attach Empowerment to 2 random cards in your deck.
Usage(s): 2
When this card is discarded while on the field: Draw 2 cards with Empowerment attached, and attach 1 stack of Battle Plan to your active character.
